body:

# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlillkky-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Have the Democrats Gone Nuts?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlillkky-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats' march to the left has been breathtaking. Here's what I think is going on. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlillkky-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlillkky-kujkulhluu-k/)

Are the Democrats really going to do it - pack the Supreme Court? You can read about it in this week's blog. name: Catalina Lauf
subject: [Breaking] I’m running to defeat anti-Trump Adam Kinzinger!
body:
I’m reaching out today to share exciting news with you!
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4aea8ce7ed82490c95b9dfefba5c146e&_e=0_apHXEr2QZ3pngAu82Rly7YYlBmTck1qUZFws9tHx3C2jGJayvuAP3lmvO4Bha2-Cm_rot8xU65zlbaUqFFM6rD3jhtkOHkwYFZXn8Q1QO2qKoZqzd1zgS7dmGNPXfS0zuDRR7RMS3Fmb_OgyoRawDVtwp2ycVHubIkb4zejPqOlI-Ll_-D5mphNertImgQEMUnVa3FDPUni_m_Defg7YXf4sSEvHr34uZxnU6rBqvJFQy8TgrHnF8B13nbUmpbzTo6yBaA95I41doj5AkvVdkzfs_7JjZ_E6xdfkTuLliE6QnGQIYRDC4KsOxWzMFUAbuxhmm49vRCcFoBxomLQw%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Conservative,
I’m reaching out today to share exciting news with you!
My name is Catalina Lauf, and I’m running for Congress to defeat **_Never Trumper Adam Kinzinger_**.
I’d need hundreds of pages to cover Adam’s entire shameful, Trump-bashing record, but all you need to know is that he’s a closet liberal who:
* **Spends his time prancing around the MSNBC and CNN studios** , and

* **Turns his back repeatedly on his conservative constituents** , including voting for Nancy Pelosi’s sham impeachment of President Trump!

That’s why I’m fighting to **STOP** his Never Trump assault on America’s founding, limited-government principles and our MAGA movement. body:

clean_body: We need strong leaders in Congress | | | | | | | Patriot, After a particularly intense election cycle for Utah's 4th Congressional District, I was proud to join Congress with Burgess Owens, a former NFL Super Bowl Champion, small business owner, and conservative champion. I'm excited to share the House floor with a leader like Burgess Owens because we are focused on helping secure our borders and end human trafficking together. | | | | | President Biden's mismanagement of our immigration system has created a humanitarian crisis at our southern border. This terrible handling of our border security has allowed the cartels to make nearly $14 million dollars per day during this crisis. We need to protect the children crossing our border and ensure those being trafficked are helped. Now more than ever, we must fight the cartels and regain control of the border. Burgess and I are working hard to secure our borders and stop the cartels from taking advantage of Biden's border crisis. | | | | | | | | | | For America, | | Kat Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
Just this morning we SUCCESSFULLY VOTED TO REMOVE LIZ CHENEY FROM GOP LEADERSHIP.
Today, we stood up to the Establishment RINOs and won with an overwhelming majority. It's abundantly clear that America First is here to stay. I have led the charge against America Last Republicans, even traveling to Liz Cheney's "home state" of Wyoming to oppose her spot on the GOP leadership team.
It is untenable to have an America Last Establishment politician as the spokesperson for our movement! I will continue to fight for the Silent Majority who want true fighters to represent them in Congress.
You can join my fight and help me support America First conservatives by donating at this secure link: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-just-voted](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dDFrnK0PefiD9c4IowQlXVs53nMg-D0NzcjsWkP7T52TF6Vfv71vn5Y4v4Rz1OcDoU0lcQqaeQgtg6VM2ktzXqUvnlq0h1zPcYjDuJts0iBgeb_JxESTtlxx6LCGvsMk5zLxtDc-K5NSxF8U3bsrHiPJ3Go_KTimz9xS4Ebdm3n-Yhr7oYLuug==&c=Qv1XGwn4fDtNHKSc13_CAb3PCXMvyago6Kmcl0fGnsbwGoSJlqUKbw==&ch=saP_6E8Hpyt65pMChLnJ_y0n3JPXjjVd20P8cmBW2qWjC0I82JUqKw==&jrc=1)
Our mission isn't over - we must continue to support true fighters that will stand up to the Establishment and the career politicians that have left our country behind. The big government, big tech, big business Republicans will continue to try to silence us. Don't let them!

Best,

From: Ralph Northam <info@terrymcauliffe.com>
Date: Thu, May 6, 2021 at 10:34 AM
Subject: It's time to get fired up

Friend,

Here's where we're at:

There's a lot going on and it's time to get fired up, Friend.

I know Terry will have our backs on the debate stage tonight and
I want to show him his entire team is standing right there with
him.

Terry's campaign is looking for 1,000 supporters to step up and
donate before midnight. Can I count on you to donate now and show
you've got Terry's back?

After Democrats were outraised by not one, but TWO Republican
candidates for Governor, we urgently need to help Terry close the
gap.

Nate Silver's 538 recently said Virginia's Governor's race will
be 2021's most competitive. In a race so close, believe me when I
tell you that everything we do between now and November will have
a huge impact on the future of our Commonwealth.

So I am asking you directly. Will you pitch in $10 right now to
show Terry that you've got his back on this pivotal day? Let's
help his team find 1,000 contributions before midnight tonight.

Ralph Northam

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Trump, white nationalism, and QAnon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Trump’s party is alive and well, with or without Trump.
#

Representative Liz Cheney and I have little in common as far as our policy positions go, but there’s a critical truth we both understand:
**The election was not stolen. President Biden won fair and square — and Republicans’ continued denial of this fact is harming our democracy.**
Yesterday, House Republicans voted Liz Cheney out as Chair of their Caucus for simply acknowledging reality. GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy has now done more to silence and condemn Liz Cheney for telling the truth than he ever did to hold Donald Trump, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and others accountable for inciting the January 6th insurrection.
The civil war within the Republican Party is now complete. There can no longer be any doubt that the GOP is the party of Trump, white nationalism, and QAnon conspiracy theorists — a party led by sycophants subversive to the rule of law and hostile to democracy itself.
**I will not compromise when it comes to protecting the sanctity of our elections and preventing Republicans from suppressing the right to vote, which is under assault in Black and brown communities across America.**
With redistricting looming and a long campaign season ahead, I expect to face resistance from Republicans and even some Democrats on these principles — so I need your help to make sure my campaign is prepared for any challenge that comes our way.
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution to my re-election campaign today. I pledge to continue this fight for our democracy, but I can’t do it without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29106242/285335775/-1533274318?refcode2=449e34a2-f7b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&refcode=em210513-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDllMzRhMi1mN2IzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QmszUtrPN53H3XiS87IUi7uabWdQ1GS_cXZQ2SJAfRw=)**
Onward,

body:

Peter,
We are so close, but haven’t quite made it to our mid-month goal. I’m reaching out today hoping with your help we can get there! The TNDP team and volunteers are filled with energy and momentum right now. We feel like we are finally developing the tools and infrastructure needed to bring about real and meaningful change.
We have the opportunity to turn Tennessee blue in 2022, but we need help doing it. Will you make a donation right now, and help us reach this critical goal? We have $2,280 left to raise, and anything helps. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

Tamara Bates

| | A close race just got a whole lot closer, Derek.

The last time elections analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight talked about the Virginia gubernatorial, they said it would be the most competitive race of 2021.

Veteran Virginia elections guru Larry Sabato agreed, saying that history points to the Virginia governor’s race being closer than anyone expects.

**Now all that is changing, because Glenn Youngkin bought the Republican nomination.**

The combination of Donald Trump’s endorsement and Youngkin’s deep pockets may be enough to push Virginia Republicans into the lead.

**[Can you rush a donation to help make sure Terry doesn’t fall behind. We have to keep up with Trump and Youngkin if we want to defend our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29108690/285346932/-2023814932?refcode=20210513_538_5AH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmI4NWFiMS1mZGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2TwrbRmnas63IV422YgBfe4waublW9c89huMmXzAPk=)**

So here’s the gamechanger:

Glenn Youngkin is promising to spend an astronomical $75 million of his own fortune to buy Virginia’s Governor’s office for Donald Trump and the Republican Party. **That alone would make 2021 the most expensive Governor’s race in Virginia history!**

So this is serious. Youngkin’s got unlimited resources. He’s got the backing of Donald Trump and he’s already attacking Terry every chance he gets.

**[We need to make sure Terry’s got the resources he needs to finish this primary strong. Will you please pitch in right now and help Terry defend Virginia’s progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29108691/285346933/-2023814932?refcode=20210513_538_5AH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmI4NWFiMS1mZGIzLWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2TwrbRmnas63IV422YgBfe4waublW9c89huMmXzAPk=)**

Thank you,

name: Emily Cupples
subject: Bill Lee, why you gotta be so heartless?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Tuesday afternoon, Bill Lee made the reckless and irresponsible decision to cut unemployment benefits. Prior to COVID-19, Lee had the chance to pass laws to protect our economy and refused to meet the moment. His decision to leave Tennessee vulnerable, led to unemployment reaching an all-time high across both rural and urban parts of the state. More than 200,000 Tennesseans have lost their jobs in the past 6 months alone, and Lee has decided to further cripple Tennesseans. Why? Because Bill Lee is not interested in serving Tennessee families. Lee has one goal: advance the interests of the fringe dark money interest groups he represents.
Tennessee families deserve and need a leader who will wake up every single morning ready to fight for them. We literally cannot afford another four years of Bill Lee’s continued destruction.
Fourteen days ago, we launched Beat Bill Lee with the mission to prioritize Tennessee working families and beat the extreme right power grab by Bill Lee. We cannot do this alone though. In order to launch a digital campaign and voter mobilization program that reaches all four corners of Tennessee, we have to raise over half a million dollars. Can you join us by making a donation? Every cent counts.
Thank you for your commitment to Tennessee, our economy, and our families.
Let’s Beat Bill Lee,
- Emily C. Cupples, Beat Bill Lee PAC Director

name: Conservative Alerts
subject: Democrats are trying to force through HR1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Gas shortage? Inflation? Crisis at the Border? Democrats have other priorities...

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/1/0100017965aec8de-a49bdd4f-8183-4272-b7be-1d3bc3156537-000000/Qvyt09Prup1xKIR-IMB-3MX8aNs=214)
---
| | Derek,

Democrats in the Senate are trying to push through H.R. 1, an attack on voter integrity, and the latest in a long line of Federal Government overreaches.

It’s not “for the people,” it’s only “For the Politicians.” H.R. 1 would federalize elections, put Washington bureaucrats in charge of OUR elections, ban common sense voter integrity measures like voter ID, and use OUR TAX DOLLARS to fund the campaigns of out-of-touch Democrats like Maggie Hassan.
---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/2/0100017965aec8de-a49bdd4f-8183-4272-b7be-1d3bc3156537-000000/IHzQ0O0rCEqv7RjXXax1iPPwgPE=214)
---
| [H.R. 1 is nothing more than a Democrat power-grab, and it needs to be stopped. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/3/0100017965aec8de-a49bdd4f-8183-4272-b7be-1d3bc3156537-000000/pLq50rXke3NZ2aqXKl7hkpnWwtU=214)

The Federal Government has already proven their incompetence time and time again; giving them more control over our elections would be nothing short of a disaster. **We’re seeing rising gas prices across the nation, shortages at the pumps, and the highest level of inflation in over a decade - our Federal Delegation’s focus on taking over our election laws instead of protecting our economy is abysmal.**
[
Help us hold Democrats like Maggie Hassan accountable, and send new leadership to Washington!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/4/0100017965aec8de-a49bdd4f-8183-4272-b7be-1d3bc3156537-000000/dto-sEmK-ope5M1WTrKIISO_cRE=214)

name: State Republican HQ
subject: Friend, will you thank our police today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
It's National Police Week
Friend,

The Democrats certainly won't be doing this, so we need your assistance today.

It's National Police Week, and State Republicans want to show our law enforcement that the majority of Americans support and appreciate them.
[SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TmSZbmmm5glt5YOX28ZJaOPa5KAuhOfDswWt3ike6iBfg4mirGMnvFuDawO3z9bTBEui1bLeeofc2a3SM3TpM5ykNrd8GON30pAWzRSwj2zWg-Nj6meqkSnYE4sp0v5wq-hodIU8Y9HKWvHWOjghWxMOdoVD_-L2b8_-q3jl1Yyh-Jlm3T_3KKk2FzePgc_Qh-TC8gc7JX87mSI22WdIIr6BaslvZVc15Kh9Y9mUO-C60ZFBH64QH3pHCxWwK7Kxt5RTVw4Ivxo8dTBKDYczhGyI0j0ZQY5p_vW0rMEghA7LXtEyyXwrXMKmGGTQ-fBFe3i6IZzJGP89D2XLjRgJ2UlHegI3mluW6XYj8sW8fRRu33XwZZRcJ7uwL--5e-Q5ayPyrQoazSiro59McpnZJdXMubV4KEnY&c=IkzFEwvYG0_XN-Ins_dCOYF8ptchwhmpSgsCoKKbEH1kU-pVQpnt7A==&ch=dfWvtIQ8wat1rhJeQUji32ruqJnR3-oxFmEBIDGu8BMnkkRwfDSJRA==)
Our heroes in blue risk their lives every day to keep our friends and family safe.

This National Police Week, help us show them their efforts do not go unnoticed.

-State Republicans

subject: Keep Indiana Moving Forward!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Indiana is roaring back, but that means we’re now a top target of the left! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470474?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-budget-week-2?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_BudgetWeek2_051021&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=0353f06553&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican

As many parts of the country are struggling to recover from the COVID-19 pandemic, Indiana is roaring back!

It’s not sheer luck either — Under Republican leadership, Indiana is proving that you can balance your books, fund your priorities, keep taxes low, and make strategic investments that will positively impact Indiana’s future.

We just passed our ninth straight balanced budget; funding Hoosiers’ priorities and making key investments into our future. Thanks to careful planning, we were able to pay off over $1.6 billion in debt!

And job creators are continuing to take notice by choosing to invest in Indiana. In just the last couple weeks, we’ve had major job commitments from Apple, Toyota, and Amazon. Those three companies alone will create nearly 3,000 jobs and invest nearly $1 billion in our state!

What that means for those communities is truly transformational.

We were able to accomplish a lot for Indiana, thanks to our conservative leadership always putting people above politics. Instead of wasting millions or even billions on partisan pet projects, we spent wisely and kept taxes low, allowing Hoosiers to get back to work and get our economy rolling again.

Because we’ve done so well with conservative, Republican policy in Indiana, the Democrats have made our state one of their top targets for the upcoming midterm elections.

They’re raising money hand over fist to bring a blue wave to the heartland, and we can NOT let that happen. Please chip in what you can right now to help us head the radical left off at the pass and keep Indiana RED!

CHIP IN $5 TO KEEP INDIANA RED >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-budget-week-2?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_BudgetWeek2_051021&utm_agency=alpha&amount=5&mc_cid=0353f06553&mc_eid=UNIQID)

CHIP IN $25 TO KEEP INDIANA RED >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-budget-week-2?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_BudgetWeek2_051021&utm_agency=alpha&amount=10&mc_cid=0353f06553&mc_eid=UNIQID)

clean_body: Harley Rouda, Pelosi's biggest ally in Orange County, wasn't kidding when he said he wanted a rematch against Michelle Steel. ** . == Harley Rouda, Pelosi's biggest ally in Orange County, wasn't kidding when he said he wanted a rematch against Michelle Steel after losing reelection to her back in November. And right now, he is making moves to win back the seat Michelle won. Pelosi has already given thousands of dollars towards Rouda 's Rematch. She is plotting how to get rid of Michelle and replace her with a liberal ally who will give her unchecked power and the ability to pass whatever kind of radical agenda she wants. We have to stand with Michelle right now if we want to stop this from happening. == | == == == We cannot stress enough how important it is that Michelle has our support. With Pelosi funneling money to Rouda, and this district as one of the DCCC's top targets to flip in 2022, Michelle Steel will need every last conservative at her side. Will you help Michelle Steel stand up to the Democrats?** \-- California Republican News Alerts With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I confronted AOC - Nancy Pelosi is fuming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter -- I walked right up to AOC and challenged to debate
her economy-wrecking Green New Deal AGAIN.
What did AOC do? She ran straight to Nancy
Pelosi. . .
Now, Nancy Pelosi wants me "punished" for
calling out AOC's hate-America Jihad Squad out in front of the
American people.

Not only does Nancy Pelosi want me
investigated for "Ethics violations," her Democrat henchman are
working to EXPEL me from Congress.
This is outrageous and yet another attempt to
overturn an election!
Will you stand with me and chip in $15, $25,
$50, $100 -- whatever you can afford -- right away?
Defunding the police, ripping America's
southern border wide open, Democrats packing the Supreme Court, a
federal takeover of America's elections. . .
These are just some of the socialist power
grabs Democrats are fighting for every singe day.
On top of it all, AOC wants to ram her
Socialist job-crushing Green New Deal on the American people.
But I'm fighting every single day in the
Swamp to stop the socialists from bringing America to it's knees.

That's EXACTLY why they want me investigated
and expelled from Congress.

STAND WITH MTG -- RUSH DONATE $25
Because I fought to hold hate-America leftist
Maxine Waters accountable. . .because I filed Articles of
Impeachment against Joe Biden. . .because I'm working to FIRE
FAUCI. . . Nancy Pelosi's Democrats are -- once again! -- trying
to expel me from Congress!
And if that doesn't work, the Democrats are
preparing for an onslaught of negative attack ads against me in
next year's elections!
I'm talking about TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS
TO DEFEAT ME.
Will you please help me fight back with an
emergency $25 or more chip in right away.

Your donation provides me with the resources
to not only protect myself and fend off challengers, but support
other candidates who stand for America First!

We must have the resources to defend against
these nasty smear tactics and show that you and I and the America
First agenda are not going anywhere!
Make no mistake, the Radical Left, led by AOC
and the Squad, are trying to remove me from office for defending
President Trump. And as President Trump's biggest supporter, I've
become Enemy #1.
But in reality, they're not after me. They're
after you. I'm just in their way.
I must fight back. I must have the resources
to defend myself in the public sphere.
Will you stand with me? Chip in $15, $25,
$50, $100, $1,000 -- whatever you can afford -- right away.

I'm under constant assault from the most
radical socialists in Washington, D.C.
In fact, on top of Democrats trying to remove
me from office, the Fake News writes nonstop hit pieces, and the
Silicon Valley Cartel is always trying to shut me down.
But I will not be intimidated or silenced
because I have the support of you, the people!
If you stand with me, please, chip in with
whatever you can afford. Every bit helps me fight back through
email, text messages, phone calls and even social media (when I'm
not censored!).
Even if it's just $10, every dollar goes a
long way.
Thanks so much. I will keep you updated.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

| | Elaine is a 20-year Navy veteran and nuclear engineer who served her country with one philosophy: **Be Good. Do Good Work.** She brought that philosophy with her to Congress when she flipped a traditionally Republican district that Trump won by just 2.3 points in 2018, securing our Democratic House majority. body:

After Stacey Abrams FLIPPED Georgia blue and shocked the GOP, Georgia’s Governor signed one of the WORST voter suppression laws on record to sabotage Democrats’ chances of winning again. Speaker Pelosi is now PERSONALLY 3X-matching all gifts to stop this. She needs 10,000 gifts before midnight to fund her rapid response. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting for Honest Elections
body:
Because standing strong now is the most important thing you can do to defend the rule of law under the U.S. Constitution

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is committed to honest elections and our essential work fighting against the Left's schemes to tilt the electoral playing field in their favor for decades to come.
We are the nation's leading private litigator suing states that fail to follow federal law and maintain accurate voter rolls as federal law requires...
...and we've racked up several important victories. Our historic lawsuits in **California** , **Indiana** , **Kentucky** and **Ohio** have set a new standard for state compliance with federal law requiring them to make "reasonable efforts" to clean their voter rolls of ineligible voters...
**In my view, this is the single best and most important safeguard we can ensure in terms of stopping voter fraud****.**
**_[That's why I hope you will join our fight by making your best tax-deductible gift right now to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)_**.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)
---

Today, we're pursuing more "clean voter roll" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **Illinois** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** -- and we've got more on the way!

And, in **Georgia,** we sued Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for records related to a Consent Agreement he and others entered into with the Democratic Party of **Georgia** as to how they processed absentee ballots... _which many experts believe substantially weakened anti-fraud measures_.

We also sued the Georgia Secretary of State for documents related to the much-hyped January 2, 2021 phone call between him, then-President Donald Trump and others concerning alleged voter fraud!

But time is running short.

Last year, the Left exploited the pandemic to open new fronts in their full-scale assault on ballot integrity which resulted in too many states using mail-in voting on highly inaccurate voter lists...which is the best way I know to leave our elections open to voter fraud on a wide scale and sometimes enough even to influence the outcome of elections!

And that's exactly how the Left likes it. They seem to prefer an electoral "free for all" that creates as many opportunities as possible for individuals who support their candidates to vote...whether they're American citizens or not, or otherwise legally eligible to vote or not!

With your **_[best gift today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)_** , we will be able to do the heavy lifting to expose and prosecute fraudulent election practices where we find them and intervene in support of election integrity measures as the opportunities arise.

**Will you help us _go the distance_ in the fight to preserve the rule of law and clean voter rolls _[by making your best donation to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)_**?

Your support is important to the success of our fight for clean elections! Thank you.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

P.S. **_[I hope you will help Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)_** go the distance to keep investigating potential election fraud in states across the country and use the courts to fight for honest elections...and on all fronts where we are fighting for the rule of law and the American people's right to know!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53680&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTMxNDEyMDA=)
---
|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

name: Nancy Mace
subject: why is the post office spying on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
The United States Postal Service was created by our founders. It's in the Constitution -- much like the 4th Amendment, which guards against... [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=df5aee3355bc47a88a64693c829ad085&_e=-jrAvuXrGeoBs02tl4parlecQAIvMehH_pJGRuBE3w3H5LuIFN1brs8CxpVbJgNbcopVdJWvJxj1cDCUC60pJzoiUytiS2GHs99-5AtRiv4hSlrFWgirttvnYUxRjfZTpDAczz3Jj_wOlEBTKeMGV-2S6aEzjIxk85p549ll9tUNmPmq6gPMur0eOZXYxMDfKVYA7w4o_zTU_-Sxpbc7ItcpZ4ayH9VOxER0pA1gu8_9da_FsxnG0_KBg1VSWOBK6qynKYvLUxZMfbgCu9Sh-16BCswyZYsfeMRZ3n8_yjO8qDBBzkVJa9hOau0CcnjUbJGMqNpVFI8d39doCMSU28PksxZQKd13A1zDWw90FAn17FLO0PHo77zIwoEGljjh9mVhizE2KwvwCJOridvN8Bc2NGhcT5TSzy1r7-7PxQk9PCsMsOJ5ZeHToNZ0j7geAutMkHM4Zv58H-C-0Mjk6yriwMYmX2dCA9ZVeB-GiXE%3D) Friend, The United States Postal Service was created by our founders. It's in the Constitution -- much like the 4th Amendment, which guards against unreasonable search and seizures.
**That's why it's especially concerning that the USPS has transformed into an arm of the "deep state."** Reports recently revealed that the postal service has been operating as a kind of thought police with its own “covert” surveillance agency to monitor the social media activities of the public for “inflammatory” content. [**END POSTAL SERVICE SPYING: ADD YOUR NAME >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=df5aee3355bc47a88a64693c829ad085&_e=-jrAvuXrGeoBs02tl4parlecQAIvMehH_pJGRuBE3w3H5LuIFN1brs8CxpVbJgNbcopVdJWvJxj1cDCUC60pJzoiUytiS2GHs99-5AtRiv4hSlrFWgirttvnYUxRjfZTpDAczz3Jj_wOlEBTKeMGV-2S6aEzjIxk85p549ll9tUNmPmq6gPMur0eOZXYxMDfKVYA7w4o_zTU_-Sxpbc7ItcpZ4ayH9VOxER0pA1gu8_9da_FsxnG0_KBg1VSWOBK6qynKYvLUxZMfbgCu9Sh-wLjIo40zqEvRhVPHIBeCSMVPe_DEOWj-cjZO9-RSQHiuFxvBLmtt5wP6iIWfNvFYw4WkPaQeKyp0hYjIu5TjjO3EkV-1TCR03MOVQRjApD-THv287PuWHIwh1JekOmyvVwz_YVj4egjaz-bt3t1jJc-gsG_5GLTg0qEHXoPXgjlV56RY1PMeREhnVRUp9gW4Dqlk6erTCKrB5_3QPE0CmY%3D) Honestly, it's shocking. _The post office can't even deliver our mail on time, but it thinks it’s appropriate to run a sophisticated domestic spy program targeting its customers? _ **I can't be the only one asking: why on earth is the post office running an intelligence operation?** The Internet Covert Operations Program at the Postal Service _(yes, they actually call themselves iCOP)_ was an intelligence-collecting program unknown to Congress UNTIL NOW. They've been operating in complete secret, without approval, and without any accountability. clean_body: The United States Postal Service was created by our founders. It's in the Constitution -- much like the 4th Amendment, which guards against... Friend, The United States Postal Service was created by our founders. It's in the Constitution -- much like the 4th Amendment, which guards against unreasonable search and seizures. That's why it's especially concerning that the USPS has transformed into an arm of the "deep state." Reports recently revealed that the postal service has been operating as a kind of thought police with its own “covert” surveillance agency to monitor the social media activities of the public for “inflammatory” content. Honestly, it's shocking. The post office can't even deliver our mail on time, but it thinks it’s appropriate to run a sophisticated domestic spy program targeting its customers? I can't be the only one asking: why on earth is the post office running an intelligence operation? The Internet Covert Operations Program at the Postal Service (yes, they actually call themselves iCOP) was an intelligence-collecting program unknown to Congress UNTIL NOW. They've been operating in complete secret, without approval, and without any accountability. They can't tell us when the program started, how much taxpayers were paying to run it, or even what legal authority the post office had to spy on the public's social media activities. This is unacceptable behavior from any government agency and I want you to sign my petition today to send the message that this lawless spying must be stopped: Americans don't need another reason to distrust the Post Office. Sign the petition to protect your privacy and end the "iCOP" program. Thank you, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Everyone knows what we're up against now | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/everyone?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

>From the moment Joe Biden took the oath of office on January 20, you and I have known what we’re up against. After Biden’s recent speech to Congress, _EVERYONE_ knows.

Now that he’s in power, all the phony promises of “unity” have been thrown overboard. It’s crystal clear now that Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi want to advance the most radical, socialistic agenda in our lifetime:

❌ Amnesty for millions of illegal immigrants;
❌ Gun control and confiscation;
❌ Racist indoctrination of students and workers;
❌ Crackdowns on conservatives’ freedom of speech and religion; and
❌ Making “wokeness” America’s state religion.

**The House of Representatives is the front line in the fight for America’s soul. It is the fight – right here, right now – that the House Freedom Fund was created to win.**

For too long, conservatives had to ask establishment Republicans in The Swamp to fight for our principles and our country. They never did.

[**Now, we have a caucus of conservatives who listen to their voters and are working to stop the progressive Left. But we need your help to increase our numbers!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=e47689a0e1&e=b2c16e6198)

The 2022 election cycle is now underway, and the outlook is very promising. Democrat voters were nowhere to be found in the recent special election primary in TX-06 where no Democrat finished in the top two and now have no candidate on the ballot for the general election. With a highly motived voter base, Republicans are positioned to gain seats in the mid-term elections next year.

The only question is, _**what kind of Republicans?**_

We know what kind the Washington establishment wants: elitist, globalist, accommodating, and scared of the Left. We can’t let them decide! HFF’s mission is to Make the House Great Again with tough conservatives who stick to their principles.

[**Please support the House Freedom Fund today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=44e64dec03&e=b2c16e6198)

HFF puts candidates through the most intensive interview process in American politics – weeding out the schemers, climbers, and appeasers. HFF doesn't support career politicians. It supports HEROES. And when they do, these candidates win.

In the 2020 election cycle, HFF invested more than $16 million into 52 House races and helped 44 candidates win. That’s an 85% winning percentage, even in a year when Republicans lost the House!

Today, HFF’s favorite candidates have become the STRONGEST members of Congress. Leaders like Andy Biggs, Lauren Boebert, Scott Perry, Byron Donalds, and others.

[**HFF is taking back the Republican Party from Big Business, Big Tech, and Big Government politicians.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=8a3b05b377&e=b2c16e6198)

HFF’s job right now is to identify and recruit real fighters from coast to coast and then pour resources into their races to make sure the next Republican majority is committed to making America great again.

HFF is the only organization exclusively dedicated to winning the House of Representatives not for a party or an interest but **patriots** like **YOU**. With your help, we can elect a new class of lawmakers who will fight to:

✅ Build the border wall;
✅ Re-open America’s schools and economy;
✅ Protect girls’ sports from woke insanity;
✅ Protect the Second Amendment from gun-grabbers; and
✅ Take on Big Tech’s woke-capital abuse.

We can win these fights, but we can’t do it without you.

[**Please join me today in supporting the House Freedom Fund with a generous contribution to invest in the future of our movement and the survival of our country.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=57d54b98f5&e=b2c16e6198)

We need you. We need _EVERYONE_.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

---
|
---

He promised Americans a “boring” presidency. One where the “grown ups” were in charge, and people didn’t have to worry. But instead, we’re getting: ☑️ Gas Lines
☑️ High Unemployment
☑️ Israel Under Attack

clean_body: ...and it’s awful. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, We aren’t even five months into Joe Biden’s term as President, and he’s already destroyed all of the progress we made under President Trump. He promised Americans a “boring” presidency. One where the “grown ups” were in charge, and people didn’t have to worry. But instead, we’re getting: ☑️ Gas Lines ☑️ High Unemployment ☑️ Israel Under Attack ☑️ Tax Hikes ☑️ Record Spending ☑️ Inflation The worst part is that this isn’t a mistake: . The more they wreck our economy, the more they can justify their socialist Big Government Takeover. | | | | | | Americans want lower taxes, not higher taxes. They want a strong economy, not growing unemployment. And they want stability, not gas lines and rampant inflation. name: Blaine Luetkemeyer
subject: Back the Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress
body:
__
Lately, I don't think our Law Enforcement has been getting enough thanks for sacrificing their safety to protect our country's citizens. This police week, my team and I are working to fix that.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

Hello Patriot, it's clear that the majority of Americans are AGAINST defunding the police.

Most Americans agree that calls to defund the police sets a dangerous precedent and only those on the radical left echo these reckless calls.

BUT because we have an ultra-radical media base that's only interested in appeasing the radical left, these cries are being echoed across the country. It's sickening, and it needs to change.

[**Will you add your name to say THANK YOU to our Police Officers and back the Blue?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

[**👮 BACK THE BLUE 👮**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

[**✍️ ADD YOUR NAME ✍️**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

Fellow Conservative, I stand behind our police forces and the sacrifices they make for this country. Do you?

Lately, I don't think our Law Enforcement has been getting enough thanks for sacrificing their safety to protect our country's citizens. This police week, my team and I are working to fix that. [**Add your name to show our Law Enforcement your support and say thank you for their sacrifice >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

[**👮 BACK THE BLUE 👮**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

[**✍️ ADD YOUR NAME ✍️**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

We want to get as many signatures as possible to show Police around the country that they have our support. Will you help us ensure that happens? [**Add your name and BACK THE BLUE today!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v-Wq0gtn0rLPDfjGglaGA9WAY3BoZXGstNt3pylemyrvHQqHYX6yMuWH_ujs3NCCHJ-rhMqQsyN4gHRuCBHAtFq5dyiRdquWQVHvfPlJtDwHQZSJ0YrcR-LhT_KpLgd60Xh-5lfYL7b1aqiijI4aXRw7vkYgTmUvIUHdNldsXYxJLxRfQi_pWwKz1Oojkg5uj0Xd9Yp1zruZhz0lQ0RCmB429g8yh6ds54Oqrlc7UhR0VGLrZIn_WG2Ey1i32y5uPNeaBSBpLAMWSgNfa7yoSDWpyS1NHAyu7an-8GSapWvkshrGswXjXvGx2P5rOXyeAJycMgxPK9eiJLk_-8mkSiV_Q50mN2YgtJkXmxW6wL2QiLzClxA9rjFOUsoSJGIt_1xF21Jzutc2ghd9jpaeyvO6YdIPMJYC9zPf7HcxzAMOHrGMCIs-av2WM8F4_usDneE_yXgbF_w=&c=dF__BfCEnQevQMWhB08Fk-eQfzsD2tXSoIchGXLTrdTv4xKccJYwpQ==&ch=K-A0juMAFZgJFaahp2QUidYMMZRSPQgQQP_yg0lgQcqDZTPNz4CxUQ==)

Blaine Luetkemeyer

name: Giffords.org
subject: 9 mass shootings across 7 different states
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
During Mother’s Day weekend, there were nine mass shootings across seven states. 16 people died, and 41 were wounded.
For many Americans, this was the first holiday their families could gather together as we emerge from the pandemic. What they thought would be safe celebrations with loved ones instead turned violent.
More cities are beginning to allow gatherings of larger numbers. Families and friends are reconnecting, offices are reopening—and this is why now, more than ever—we need to pass universal background checks to ensure guns don’t fall into the wrong hands.
[**So we need your help, friend. Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We’ll put your contribution to work right away in our efforts to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210513-1-15&amount=3&t=1&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/2015?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=14&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy) | [Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/2003?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=15&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/2004?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=16&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy) | [Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/2005?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=17&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/2006?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=18&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy) | [Other amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/1999?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=19&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy)
---|---
We’re gathering in groups again. Memorial Day, Father’s Day, and more celebrations are right around the corner.
But that should not mean more shootings. Gun sales are hitting record highs and we need to make sure these purchases are made legally, responsibly, and safely.
With your help, we’ll be able to pass universal background checks and stop the NRA from unraveling decades of gun safety measures. As life begins to return to a sense of normalcy, we need to ensure that a sense of safety comes along as well.
Each contribution is a statement that Americans want universal background checks. So thank you for standing with us today and always.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=20&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=103%2E3935704%2EgWjkNy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Update on our work in May
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’ve had to make adjustments.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210513-2077-header&t=1&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)
Traditionally after each election, thousands of campaign staff and field organizers get laid off until it’s time to resume voter outreach for the next election cycle — about a year later.
But this whole idea that you only need to campaign in an election year is one reason why Democrats have fallen short. We cannot organize, phone bank, host community events, and share important conversations with our neighbors _only when it’s time to vote_.
Our campaign isn’t slowing down or taking an “off year” — we’re investing in keeping organizing staff on the ground, continuing volunteer work year-round, and building momentum for our progressive movement across the country. **That’s why it’s so important that we keep up with our monthly fundraising goals this year — but right now we’re about halfway through May, and we’re not halfway towards our goal.**
[Based on our average contribution, we need to raise at least 7,500 contributions by this Saturday to stay on track. If you’re able, will you make your first donation right now to help us hit our May target so we can maintain our critical programs even in non-election years?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-2077-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2077_2526796_eMGzVK&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-2077-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2077_2526796_eMGzVK&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-2077-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2077_2526796_eMGzVK&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)
To be totally honest, April was a slower fundraising month than we expected, so we had to adjust our May goal to make up some ground. Every donation, no matter how much, we receive today helps us meet this crucial target and ensures we don’t fall behind.
We only rely on grassroots supporters — reading emails like this one — to fund this campaign. And the donations we receive from you help set budgets for these critical organizing programs in 2021. If our numbers come up short, we may not be able to follow through on 100% of our plan.
**[Can you make one of the 7,500 contributions we're relying on before Saturday? This goal may be ambitious, but we’ve never set the aspirations of this movement around what is easy, but what needs to be done.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-2077-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=2077_2526796_eMGzVK&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)**
Thank you for all that you do,
–Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-2077-P&t=25&refcode2=2077_2526796_eMGzVK&akid=2077%2E2526796%2EeMGzVK)**

clean_body: We’ve had to make adjustments. Traditionally after each election, thousands of campaign staff and field organizers get laid off until it’s time to resume voter outreach for the next election cycle — about a year later. But this whole idea that you only need to campaign in an election year is one reason why Democrats have fallen short. We cannot organize, phone bank, host community events, and share important conversations with our neighbors only when it’s time to vote. Our campaign isn’t slowing down or taking an “off year” — we’re investing in keeping organizing staff on the ground, continuing volunteer work year-round, and building momentum for our progressive movement across the country. That’s why it’s so important that we keep up with our monthly fundraising goals this year — but right now we’re about halfway through May, and we’re not halfway towards our goal. To be totally honest, April was a slower fundraising month than we expected, so we had to adjust our May goal to make up some ground. Every donation, no matter how much, we receive today helps us meet this crucial target and ensures we don’t fall behind. We only rely on grassroots supporters — reading emails like this one — to fund this campaign. And the donations we receive from you help set budgets for these critical organizing programs in 2021. If our numbers come up short, we may not be able to follow through on 100% of our plan. Thank you for all that you do, –Team AOC | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Washington state's historic climate bills
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The Climate Commitment Act and Clean Fuel Standard, explained.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3h~Z6VLC~/REcxdXFKREpsS1ZTVGxNTG1mRGJmNVRGUURHS2VoSWR0VS85SjJRZ1VxKy9qcGNKKzEweWk3bkJhYXJSSUxOZVpSbWhTemptcm1ZaDhxN0loQlpIQW1nR0h5QnFZRXJGZmo5UUtTTm82RzQ9S0/Y0NvajF3OHFaVVhEbGtycHgwQVpjdDJBdjRGYkNFTTArU1gxcEhVQnMyVT0S1) Friend, The 2021 legislative session was the culmination of years of climate advocacy in Washington state, thanks to longtime supporters like you. It was only because of you and your devoted yearslong advocacy that we were able to achieve two extraordinary wins for climate, the Climate Commitment Act and the Clean Fuel Standard. In a moment, I'm going to tell you in much more detail just how monumental these wins are. **But first, I want to ask you to continue to contribute to building this statewide -- and national -- climate movement so that we can keep bringing wins back home to Washingtonians.[Donate today so we can make more climate progress together!](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/4Ee7hqrPNwB7/REcxdXFKREpsS1ZTVGxNTG1mRGJmNVRGUURHS2VoSWR0VS85SjJRZ1VxKy9qcGNKKzEweWk3bkJhYXJSSUxOZVpSbWhTemptcm1ZaDhxN0loQlpIQW1nR0h5QnFZRXJGZmo5UUtTTm82RzQ9S0/Y0NvajF3OHFaVVhEbGtycHgwQVpjdDJBdjRGYkNFTTArU1gxcEhVQnMyVT0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfaWRV6cx/REcxdXFKREpsS1ZTVGxNTG1mRGJmNVRGUURHS2VoSWR0VS85SjJRZ1VxKy9qcGNKKzEweWk3bkJhYXJSSUxOZVpSbWhTemptcm1ZaDhxN0loQlpIQW1nR0h5QnFZRXJGZmo5UUtTTm82RzQ9S0/Y0NvajF3OHFaVVhEbGtycHgwQVpjdDJBdjRGYkNFTTArU1gxcEhVQnMyVT0S1)

---
Now, a little bit about the historic climate bills we just passed in Washington state:
**The Climate Commitment Act** creates a cap-and-invest program that limits and reduces greenhouse gas emissions across our economy. It also enacts one of the strongest environmental justice policies in the nation: Under the CCA, Washington's Department of Ecology will assess which communities are hardest hit by pollution and engage with them directly to determine whether pollution is decreasing over time -- and take action if it's not. All the while, we'll have a standing environmental justice advisory committee that gives members of frontline communities and tribes a voice in policy design and investment decisions.
Another big step forward for Washington this session was the passage of the **Clean Fuel Standard** , which reduces carbon emissions by expanding use of electric vehicles and lower-carbon fuels. In addition to giving people more choices at the pump, it will increase local demand for biofuels, creating new green jobs.
Together, the Climate Commitment Act and the Clean Fuel Standard will accelerate Washington state's lead in tackling the climate crisis -- and provide a roadmap for other states to improve public health and grow their economies by taking it on, too.
**Both of these bills passed because we raised our voices, together, for climate action.[To keep the momentum going, please chip in today as we continue to make Washington a beacon of progress on climate, equity, and more.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/4Ee7hqrPNwB7/REcxdXFKREpsS1ZTVGxNTG1mRGJmNVRGUURHS2VoSWR0VS85SjJRZ1VxKy9qcGNKKzEweWk3bkJhYXJSSUxOZVpSbWhTemptcm1ZaDhxN0loQlpIQW1nR0h5QnFZRXJGZmo5UUtTTm82RzQ9S0/Y0NvajF3OHFaVVhEbGtycHgwQVpjdDJBdjRGYkNFTTArU1gxcEhVQnMyVT0S1)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [Open] There’s some good news in here!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we have a little bad news and some good news.
**The bad news is:** A major National Republican and Trump donor announced he is running against Mark. As soon as he became a candidate, he spent $337,896 on TV ads. On top of that, the NRSC also spent tens of thousands of dollars on ads of their own.
**The good news is:** We’ve been here before! We know how to defeat opponents with deep pockets. We learned last year that this team can show up for Mark, chip in $5 or $10 at a time, and still go up against some of the biggest dark money groups and WIN.
**This campaign has always been powered by generous folks like you who give $5, $10 or even $25 to emails just like this. So if you can, please consider making a donation today, it would mean so much.**
[**Click here to make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign! We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=1&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210513-1-15&t=2&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210513-1-15&t=3&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb)

---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210513-1-15&t=6&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210513-1-15&t=7&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb)

We’re confident that with your help we will be able to stay on track to hit our fundraising goals so we can organize and prepare for the fight to keep Mark in the Senate.
Thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210513-1-15&t=8&refcode2=593_6688874_4l55jb&akid=593%2E6688874%2E4l55jb)**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Big Tech, I’m Coming After You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Conservatives have been singled out, silenced, and censored by the digital oligarchs of Silicon Valley. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbd76de6ec024293bb4e3c166bad36b8&_e=8yF9YBM6sfr9HVWpFAwH9JlG936hErcjNC5ItkQjyG0Z739OgE1-QtKcKErJ4US5UszKzMXvXM5HDNCHmTf_eq7GAQI39k-deqw21mOk0qSKXyASbzH-hHdJ9LnHXa3NSidvSkHdEKaw2tz9C41J8Xl_Xp0_qFCvXNjP9uAztrjd-waspCWOhCe0mPLODgvSpYCDc8UvTbExX94KTE3QzaciOb43XY8K8YaWCY1q-h4_pq4A0bd3Lj00frC5jnQ5U5FIJYRrmp-uecgUEWmODcAKTlSBQJsCMk8o1T9YreFNDICuH_aLS31N0_1ato4muwhR0jwJHi4VdWNVb9p_zPjlWfGKQ0TObPcVcweSuJUW34f1F6v9xkTXzQS5mbaZu_0wUV0Cti9tfEx_gKDnxg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Last month, I introduced legislation to** BREAK UP BIG TECH.**
** **
Conservatives have been singled out, silenced, and censored by the **digital oligarchs of Silicon Valley.**

It’s clear to see, Big Tech has a monopoly problem; it’s not capitalism when they use their massive influence to cut sweetheart deals with the Obama/Biden Administration (like Google was caught doing).

[**For the good of free speech, for the good of the Constitution, and for the good of our nation, we must break up big tech!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbd76de6ec024293bb4e3c166bad36b8&_e=8yF9YBM6sfr9HVWpFAwH9JlG936hErcjNC5ItkQjyG0Z739OgE1-QtKcKErJ4US5y17XxAZrg7NroOxRimnoUDjUZY4qY_PL1OyBhuU0pEJ7CEcYGFSKnekPsaePv4UGZ5ZVEYiykSiAQqpL5FCX82nZb5QVMIKZzknoiWhCoQ887AMs4lr0neVA2tM68by3sPTIp42LCSjUl9K5bcE05wAkMjulzfinVdCm7uIEU0ECm4w6k7jEYUSE7RFwsQI_43VZwrbfpX7Yj3oxfRVWg_H7ZI7DqYX4Wy_a00WWwdKQTsX-jAI7LQt29gkvn_UQZgn5T9mmIGrgtjoZl5PZfEdl-WE5ShKCDHHTCGeqAhqyrPv1rcOWWWiaJKaPuMzVE1QMNzFt7TCNuCOWTupnBg%3D%3D)** ****
**

I’m not winning any favors with the corporate, lobbyist, super PAC class of donors— they’ve very loudly proclaimed that they won’t donate to my campaign— **GOOD**!!

The corporate, lobbyist, super PAC class is the backbone of Democrat party donors, and I want no part of them!

I have an army of local, everyday Americans who are tired of corporations shipping jobs to China while preaching social justice in America; **everyday Americans who are tired of free speech being regulated by Silicon Valley liberals**.

[**Will you join me, and help send a message to the left?**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbd76de6ec024293bb4e3c166bad36b8&_e=8yF9YBM6sfr9HVWpFAwH9JlG936hErcjNC5ItkQjyG0Z739OgE1-QtKcKErJ4US5y17XxAZrg7NroOxRimnoUDjUZY4qY_PL1OyBhuU0pEJ7CEcYGFSKnekPsaePv4UGZ5ZVEYiykSiAQqpL5FCX82nZb5QVMIKZzknoiWhCoQ887AMs4lr0neVA2tM68by3svpqQkmgqoWuAghV-rG9hDTRQlALn7DtNTvqmDYXPdz3-J4OSKG-GVpvtm3k-hnaWjqd3C2MB1UlFYzlGexdEK1xxwu4n8BpuhxI2Jruxszhy8QwyZ5J3tZB3Udyy-6qDq_dvB0B6hUoRX0Zo__NJl7XOa3kOVApDxPH7ifapKVP9Bgpqh773Xsm87frHM5W55-KvX7dKDmXZeac_pjBBA%3D%3D)
[_**DONATE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbd76de6ec024293bb4e3c166bad36b8&_e=8yF9YBM6sfr9HVWpFAwH9JlG936hErcjNC5ItkQjyG0Z739OgE1-QtKcKErJ4US5y17XxAZrg7NroOxRimnoUDjUZY4qY_PL1OyBhuU0pEJ7CEcYGFSKnekPsaePv4UGZ5ZVEYiykSiAQqpL5FCX82nZb5QVMIKZzknoiWhCoQ887AMs4lr0neVA2tM68by39eUKNCPy1Ersn_3VVLGd0SWf4BwGJ316THjuypBdkc7iWP4-klNExzGc3yQK8wQzFnk9C0rosribuGlsNMXsplYTMxjjy9FcZkXoqSg6yLQaX7VHkIoEskK71pO2B-GONkOk5OSF7p5eozpvoW2ieGDmMUfXPMufIfyomTnpC5BWYswbzXenwqzMyeeN3EeeWXDc9TzGCf0uUbFJfFabfg%3D%3D)

Josh Hawley

name: Ellie Warner, Terry for VA
subject: I’m freaking out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Glenn Youngkin is the worst possible outcome, Derek.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29123899/285404848/-2023814932?refcode=20210513_EW_5Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkZWNkZi0yOGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOOpROUG8PYz4boJpI2l1qYFHJtvZC_BBqd_hcia2Ls=)

| | For months, polls of the Republican primary showed Amanda Chase as the clear frontrunner.

But in the end she lost to Glenn Youngkin, a mega-rich extremist who bought the nomination with the full backing of Donald Trump and Ted Cruz.

Derek, I’m freaking out. Amanda Chase was scary, but Glenn Youngkin is the worst possible outcome for Virginia’s future.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We have to protect legal voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections.

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---
**ELECTION INTEGRITY PLEDGE** : Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. **We can put an end to these attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run - but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority **.

**[We're looking for 589 conservatives to sign our Election Integrity Pledge today. Please add your signature before midnight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r) **

| [**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---

Peter,

What a year for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House - **in the middle of the night** \- without a single Republican vote.

Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation - H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill - which if passed by the Senate would enable **Democrats** to cement a **permanent Congressional majority**.

How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including,
1. Allowing government agencies to _**ignore immigration status**_ when referring applicants to election boards under "automatic" voter registration, and,
2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem!

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---

While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1:
1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns - up to $5 MILLION dollars.
2. Congress will be committed to delivering "full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) - bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own.

**We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run - but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---

I have to be honest with you, Peter, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections _forever_.

It's our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi's blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. **[If we don't act now, soon it may be too late.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)**

Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together - like Ohio and Florida - **they're going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois**.

Consider that for 97 days, New York's 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic.

Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, **it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---

**On a final note:** With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud!

In the name of liberty, **[please sign our petition today denouncing H.R. 1.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)**

We must act before it's too late.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
Jim Jordan

[**Protect Election Integrity ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58037985:sj34jGdN9:m:1:2247059263:19D9167A060233BEB2A14F4B783ADB7B:r)
---
_We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osj34jGdN9)****_

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

| | | I wanted to write to let you know that we hit our goal and were able to expand our media buy today. Unfortunately, we fell a bit short. I’m going to have my team follow up with some of you via text to see if you can give quickly.

If you gave towards this critical goal, thank you! Expanding this media buy is our best path to victory. If you haven’t had a chance to give, do so now and we will include it in our next wire to the stations:

I know I ask for a lot and I hope you know that all your support is appreciated. We are making a difference and I know I can win this primary (and the general) with you by my side.

Thanks,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. BUT THEN, far-right GOP extremists like Kelli Ward refused to accept their loss and started pushing a sham election "audit" and 23 voter suppression bills to advance their Trumpist agenda and prevent Democrats from ever winning another election. NOW, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to stop these attacks in their tracks and save the future of our state by flipping the governorship blue. But POLITICO reports that the GOP is planning to spend MILLIONS to defeat us – and I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back and win. I'm an Obama administration alum who's running for governor to defeat the GOP extremism that's holding our state hostage and restore the promise of Arizona – and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that we can win. **Here’s the thing:** We know we can win here in Wisconsin, but it’s not going to be easy. As one of the only non-millionaires in the race, Tom can’t self fund and, as he’s been in Outagamie County most of his life, he doesn’t know a lot of Wall Street executives. _And he prefers not to have to rely on the folks who helped crash our economy during the last financial crisis._ But this means we need grassroots supporters like you to step up.

We know if we have the resources necessary to get out our message and connect with voters in every corner of Wisconsin, _our campaign will be successful._ But don’t just take our word for it:

name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: BREAKING: The largest middle class tax cut in California history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Kevin Faulconer’s plan will put thousands back into YOUR pocket, Peter. Read more >>
**BREAKING: Faulconer releases** **HISTORIC Tax Plan** Peter, Did you catch our MAJOR campaign announcement? We released Kevin’s tax plan, **which includes the largest middle-class tax cut in California history!** The plan focuses on lasting tax relief and lower taxes for California families. Families will save nearly $4,000 per year while individuals will save nearly $2,000! Many lower-income earners will also see their tax liability reduced to ZERO. As one of the most-taxed states in America, Californians are leaving the state in droves. _Simply put, it’s too expensive to live here. _ But with Kevin as Governor, we can change that. We need your help to make this plan a reality. **As the ONLY candidate releasing ACTUAL plans to solve the major issues facing our state, it’s vital that our message reaches voters.** _Make a grassroots contribution now! _ [**CHIP IN $25 - help reach 25 voters >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/5fd287ea30ac0fb2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 - help reach 100 voters >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/934f2957e72ea9abc3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN ANY GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/272f23dbd5ecbf84c3d6b838967d376c/34943) **Kevin isn’t interested in regurgitating hollow, political talking points.** California has suffered enough under the reign of a Governor who couldn’t be bothered with SOLVING our state’s problems. _If you haven’t read Kevin’s tax plan yet, here’s a brief snippet; _ [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/9bac5026069770efc3d6b838967d376c/34943) _The complete plan can be found on our campaign website!_ Since day one of this campaign, Kevin has been saying it’s time for a California comeback. Are you with us? For our future,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/0af20d7072db3120c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/d58ea2d6108a6855c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/902b53a4c78ad30ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b8b7c02b3f647a/4e1cf1af01db457bc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

This is not surprising since they PROMISED to over-regulate and restrict our oil and gas industry. Gasoline shortages are running rampant across the country. President Biden's executive decision to halt the construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline further contributes to it. I won't put up with Biden's radical agenda anymore. It's time to fight back. ARE YOU WITH ME? Friend, we have to put an end to the left 's agenda. clean_body: I'm choosing FREEDOM over LOCKDOWN. Will you, %%First Name%%? == Hi, Friend, it's Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds. I'm reaching out today because Republican governors need your help. Right now we're fighting against the most radical agenda our nation has ever seen. From open borders and court-packing to the Green New Deal, the Biden-Harris administration and Far-Left's governance has been a disaster for our country. The other week I participated in a town hall with Republican Governors from across the nation to talk about the success we have seen in our states. We're showing America a clear alternative. FREEDOM over LOCKDOWNS. PERSONAL RESPONSIBILITY over GOVERNMENT MANDATES. Friend, that 's how we keep America moving forward. Our town hall showed that GOP governors are the last line of defense against the catastrophic progressive agenda we see coming from Washington. That's why we need your help. == **== == == Iowa is OPEN. Our kids are safely back in their classrooms - and have been since LAST AUGUST. Iowa is LEADING the way. That success can be replicated across the country when we refuse to back down to the liberal agenda, their allies in the media, and when we choose FREEDOM instead of the Left 's LOCKDOWNS. Across the country, GOP governors are saying NO to the Far Left's mandates, but we can't do it alone. == == == == The only way we stop the liberal agenda for good is by working together to hold the line against this radical administration and restoring GOP leaders across the country. == Thank you for everything you do, Governor Kim Reynolds | Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! name: Ibraheem Samirah
subject: Affordable housing is a critical issue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
Affordable housing is a critical issue that is often ignored by politicians of both parties. The economic consensus is clear that where you live, down to the exact neighborhood and block, often determines your social and economic outcomes

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29128744/285420239/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWNkYWQzZi0zYWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxcf6rLt7j0cBx8OwbNbodKnpYdFmwJC8KpJyds4JJ0=) Derek, Here's the facts: **Affordable housing is a critical issue that is often ignored by politicians of both parties.** The economic consensus is clear that where you live, down to the exact neighborhood and block, often determines your social and economic outcomes. That’s because housing not only decides your health and stability but your physical access to good jobs, quality schools, healthy food options, public transit, and other crucial services. It is for this reason that racial and economic segregation presents generational disadvantages to communities across Virginia. Here in Virginia (and across the country) there is a critical shortage of affordable, available homes for working-class families. **As Delegate I've been working to develop bipartisan legislation to address this monumental issue because I believe that new, affordable housing is the key to unlocking a new decade of progress for the Commonwealth.** Since the minute I entered this position I've promoted public transit-oriented, quality, affordable housing and even established a working group on accessory dwellings, **which will potentially open up tens of thousands of affordable housing units. **While I'm extremely proud of the progress we've made so far -- it's clear to me that there's still so much work to do. **But with my primary coming up in less than a month we meed all hands on deck to ensure that I win re-election and can continue fighting for affordable housing in Virginia.[If you can, will you click here to chip in today to help my team close out this campaign strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29128745/285420240/-1001649105?refcode=210513_Affhousing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWNkYWQzZi0zYWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxcf6rLt7j0cBx8OwbNbodKnpYdFmwJC8KpJyds4JJ0=)** Sincerely,
Delegate Ibraheem Samirah | Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29128746/285420241/-1287071472?refcode=210513_Affhousing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWNkYWQzZi0zYWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxcf6rLt7j0cBx8OwbNbodKnpYdFmwJC8KpJyds4JJ0=)

name: Vanessa Clifford
subject: our 72-hour goal: 1,000 grassroots donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey Friend, it's Vanessa, Malcolm's Campaign manager.
Our mid-quarter deadline is coming up in 72 hours, but there's something else big happening that day — my birthday!
No one likes to work on their birthday, but this deadline is really important.
We have a big goal to hit this quarter to show everyone watching that we've got the momentum to go the distance in this race.
**And to stay on track to hit that goal, we need to bring in 1,000 donations over the next 72 hours.**
