name: Joe Collins
subject: NOTICE: Maxine Waters is back in court
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Joe Collins For Congress
body:
Maxine Waters is not only in danger of losing her seat, she's in serious legal trouble. Soon she'll have to defend herself in court. Maxine Waters is not only in danger of losing her seat, she's in serious legal trouble. Soon she'll have to defend herself in court. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=98549186e2494b879e683e3aa7238900&_e=LGvkw02FtDgY8vm2qZX7a_ldopV51x2683mU9_mVdhLjjuQ6k6sFki0y3YIbmz5gzr92Ay9Qmw4pvQPIqNDlQHQOjueh426N-H1CruhOe15CPzLUBwf9o2ePGWKF2JvAzG8Ci5N7iOq0NbnB-vfOZ9m1p3hZl7aJeHUmJofay7lBs7zlPHnR3LsaOBywM1MlrCTTjtj3h05b3mUw1wg9BMf5pv_8STjOLyVFxePozou7sxyuBzX64_5iXePlvrICdZxsjJyod4lTgz9lvX41DNtBowoDLd7WJycm9vrEnqQSXZFExUei9soB6I0u2E9mbt1c5A8ZOb1W3yLKJQR9x5KNzYgsV6JrxHR8dM80-Xnr9Ffm2uhiGXyjFE_OrNgr-Q47NUh0EOgYQmeYmFQ0HZNJ_vhufH4iMbrlT-1NxRA%3D)
---
Peter,

Maxine Waters is not only in danger of losing her seat, she’s in serious legal trouble. Soon she's going to be back in court defending her defamatory statements.

Last year I filed a lawsuit against "Mad" Maxine for maliciously lying about my honorable service as a thirteen-year Veteran of the United States Navy.

In a desperate attempt to save her re-election Waters spread the lie that I was dishonorably discharged from the Navy. _Despite being presented with the evidence proving my honorable service and numerous cease and desist letters, Waters and her campaign continued to spread the lie._

When we filed the lawsuit, Waters ignored the court filing and went on record saying "I don’t care what the law says." Tomorrow she’ll have to defend her malicious and defamatory behavior.

Maxine’s going to try and drag this out as long as possible in the courts and cherry-pick ultra-liberal judges, hoping we run out of money and the suit eventually fades away. **FIRST:** _Inside Elections_ called Wisconsin a battleground state in 2022.

**THEN:** Last month, Sarah announced her campaign to defeat Ron Johnson.

**NOW:** Sarah is criss-crossing the state talking to folks about this race. We’ve set an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal, and we're quickly approaching our deadline. We need to raise $15,000 before midnight on Sunday to continue building our grassroots campaign. [**Will you chip in $5 to help us get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29130988/285427080/-382700568?gpsid=31_130_18762&refcode=em21_210513_MM1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210513_MM1_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjNiMWZmOC00NGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ypqwUVKbkTJTnkT0QGsQZlkvhuYBvYcySFFwy31pJ5Q=)

We'll be honest, we CAN flip this Senate seat, but it won't be easy. Ron Johnson has complete backing from national Republicans -- including Donald Trump -- who will do and spend _whatever it takes_ to win this race. Unlike Ron Johnson, Sarah isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Instead, we're relying on grassroots supporters to help fund this campaign.

Sarah has never backed down from a tough fight and this race will be her hardest fight to date. Are you ready to help her win?

[**Before our midnight deadline this Sunday, we need your help to ensure we stay on track with our May fundraising. | Hi friends,

I have some exciting news to share: **I am officially launching my campaign against Paul Gosar in Arizona’s 4th Congressional District.**
---

I learned the values of compassion and having a strong work ethic from my single mother and grandmother who raised me. These values have guided me throughout my life and even encouraged me to pursue a nursing degree at Arizona State University.

But Paul Gosar doesn’t share these values.

**You know Paul Gosar — his own siblings were featured in a television ad, warning Arizonans not to vote for their brother. He’s dangerous, racist, and out for himself. He even helped plan the deadly January 6 insurrection.**

Meanwhile, we have significant issues to address here in Arizona. People in our communities don’t have health care and are still suffering from the pandemic’s economic impacts. We deserve a member of Congress who will spend time listening to their constituents and will fight to deliver results, which Paul Gosar has failed to do.

**That’s why I’m taking on this challenge to defeat Paul Gosar. He is not delivering for our district, and it’s time to replace him.**

I truly believe that I can make the residents of AZ-04 proud of our district, proud of Arizona, and proud of our country. [_**But in order to flip this seat blue, we need immense grassroots support. name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: FULL DeSantis town hall, behind the scenes & more...
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0b3286ce96c9/full-desantis-town-hall-behind-the-scenes-more?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo

** Spicer & Co’s “Leading to Liberty” town hall with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis...
------------------------------------------------------------

Last night, Lyndsay and I hosted “Leading to Liberty” a Spicer & Co special town hall with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis in The Villages, Florida.

We had an amazing live audience with great questions for Governor DeSantis and also had a chance to sit down and have a more in depth conversation with the governor.

Stay tuned for more from our day with Governor DeSantis, but check out the full town hall here...
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nTb5nOgTm0M&mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID

** The mainstream media covers minority party infighting instead of actual crises...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1392877178367447042?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID

There is more than one crisis around the world at the moment - Israeli/Palestinian conflicts, a cyber terror attack causing gas shortages across the country and an ongoing humanitarian crisis at our southern border just to name a few.

Let me assure you, Congresswoman Liz Cheney losing her position as the House Republican Conference Chair is not a crisis, but you wouldn’t know that based on current media coverage of it.

Steve Krakauer (https://twitter.com/SteveKrak?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) , of the Fourth Watch, adeptly pointed out (https://twitter.com/SteveKrak/status/1392841409837809664?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) that during prime time news hours last night, CNN and MSNBC mentioned “Israel” a combined ZERO times.

For those in Washington, Rep Liz Cheney’s ousting is big news, meanwhile people around the country line up (https://www.nytimes.com/2021/05/12/business/energy-environment/gas-shortage.html?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) and fight at the gas pumps (https://nypost.com/2021/05/12/fight-at-north-carolina-gas-station-amid-panic-buying-video/?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) and our allies in Israel are under attack.

** VA GOP has a nominee for Governor...
------------------------------------------------------------

After a long convention process for the Virginia Republican Party has a nominee for governor, Glenn Youngkin (https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/virginia-politics/virginia-republican-nominee-governor-convention/2021/05/10/c31a9bbe-ae8b-11eb-acd3-24b44a57093a_story.html?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Some things never change though, a few in the media have wasted no time spreading mistruths (https://thefederalist.com/2021/05/11/new-york-times-is-already-lying-about-virginias-new-gop-gubernatorial-nominee-glenn-youngkin/?mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID#.YJqbFTxKMvU.twitter) about him.

We have Glenn scheduled to come on Spicer & Co next week, don’t miss it.

A few weeks ago on Spicer & Co we had James Davis from “Fans for Fair Play” (https://twitter.com/fansforfairplay/status/1387059665691975686?s=20&mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID) join us to discuss college athletes getting paid, so I want to know...
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1392919964974206981?s=20&mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://www.amazon.com/Split-Second-Maxwell-David-Baldacci/dp/0446533122?_encoding=UTF8&qid=1620931871&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=bf6fd3142c8e629237656d0c6c351c49&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID

** What I’m reading this week...
------------------------------------------------------------

Took a break from my normal non-fiction political reads to enjoy a political thriller that I would usually save for summer time.

An exciting read with interesting plot twists...
Get a copy here (https://www.amazon.com/Split-Second-Maxwell-David-Baldacci/dp/0446533122?_encoding=UTF8&qid=1620931871&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=bf6fd3142c8e629237656d0c6c351c49&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=4bfeaaa81e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

clean_body: | | | | | We’re only 3 SEATS away from losing our Democratic majority in the Nevada State Senate. Here’s why this matters: the state legislature decides on critically important issues that impact everyday Nevadans. This includes local voting laws, women’s reproductive rights, union labor laws, public education funding, and so much more. Here at Elect Nevada Democrats, we support on-the-ground mobilization efforts to elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. That said, our work wouldn’t be complete without your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Just two years back, our legislature became the first majority female state legislature in the country. This was a landmark moment for Nevada as a whole and the fight for equal representation in our state. And with Democrats in charge, we’re expanding access to health care for working families, protecting voting rights, and putting science first as we tackle this pandemic. Elect Nevada Democrats is fighting to make progress this upcoming election by protecting our state legislative seats, re-electing Gov. Sisolak, and keeping Catherine Cortez Masto in the Senate. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Rebecca Lambe | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC. clean_body: As White House press secretary, Sarah took on the media, the radical left, and their "cancel culture"...and she won! Peter, As White House press secretary, Sarah took on the media, the radical left, and their "cancel culture"...and she won! "I'm sorry - I'm not finished! There’s a very big difference between making honest mistakes and purposely misleading the American people. Something that happens regularly. You cannot say that it is an honest mistake when you are purposely putting out information that you know to be false or when you’re taking information that has not been validated, hasn’t been offered with any credibility and continually denied by a number of people including people with direct knowledge of an instance...I am stating that there should be a certain level of responsibility in that process." \- White House Press Secretary Sarah Huckabee Sanders to CNN's Jim Acosta As Governor, she won't give an inch. She will never bow down to the radical left or their allies in the media. She will always fight for you. Will you help her keep up the fight by making a donation now? name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We only have days to get this done.
#
Hey, y'all — it’s Jayla, fundraising director for Erica Smith for U.S. Senate. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up this Saturday, and right now we’re running $2,291 behind on our goal. **[Will you pitch in $5 to help us close the gap? I’ll explain more in a moment.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-86&t=1&refcode2=86_3698_Gh62_C&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)**
**Your $5 contribution today has a ton of power. Here’s why:**
* **Erica is running for this seat to deliver bold, progressive change for North Carolina.** Erica is the *only* candidate in this primary who has a platform for progress that includes Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, and she’s the only candidate who will truly be a Senator for *all* North Carolinians.
* **North Carolina is one of the most important battleground states for control of the Senate.** Our race for this open seat will be closely watched and it’ll be highly contested. We need to raise as much as we can *right now* to reach as many voters as possible.
* **Erica doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, fossil fuel companies, or Wall Street executives.** This is a grassroots movement powered by people, not powerful special interests. That means whether or not we hit our fundraising goals depends on folks like you reading emails like this one.

[**_It’s powerfully important that we hit our fundraising goal by midnight on Saturday, y'all. With just a few days left, can Erica count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign for the U.S. Senate?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-86&t=21&refcode2=86_3698_Gh62_C&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210513-1?refcode=em20210513-86&t=22&refcode2=86_3698_Gh62_C&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)**
Thank you for everything you do as a member of our grassroots team!
More soon,
Jayla
Finance Director, Erica for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210513-86-footer&t=23&refcode2=86_3698_Gh62_C&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=86%2E3698%2EGh62_C)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What I introduced in Congress yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, everyone deserves health care as a human right — regardless of their immigration status, how much they make, their employment status, or anything else.
As our fight for Medicare for All continues, we have to do everything we can to expand health care to more who need it. That's why I joined my friends Cory Booker and Nanette Diaz Barragán to introduce the Health Equity and Access under Law (HEAL) for Immigrant Families Act. **This bill would remove cruel and unnecessary barriers to health care for immigrants of all statuses.**
[**We're going to work hard to pass this legislation in Congress, but we need your support too. Will you join us as an official citizen co-sponsor of the HEAL Act today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/heal-act/?source=em20210513&t=1&akid=286%2E420207%2EMby9OI)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/heal-act/?source=em20210513&t=2&akid=286%2E420207%2EMby9OI)**
The pandemic we're still living through reinforces the need to eliminate barriers to health care and expand access, as COVID-19 has disproportionately impacted immigrants who represent a substantial part of America's essential, frontline workforce. Immigrants are also significantly more likely to be uninsured, placing them at a higher risk for adverse health and financial consequences.
**Here's how the HEAL for Immigrant Families Act will help:**
🏥 Ensure critical access to Medicaid and the Children's Health Insurance Program by lifting the current five-year period that lawfully present immigrants — including kids — must wait before being able to enroll in these programs
🏥 Finally provide access to public and affordable health coverage for DACA recipients
🏥 Remove the current restrictions that prevent undocumented immigrants from purchasing care through the Affordable Care Act marketplace while ensuring these individuals can obtain premium-tax credits and cost-sharing reductions
As a proud immigrant who came to this country alone at the age of 16, I know that the HEAL Act is an urgent, necessary, and just first step to eliminating senseless barriers to health care, making our communities healthier, and ensuring all immigrants get the care they need — **during a pandemic and always.**
[**Peter, let's build the movement that will get this done — join me, Senator Cory Booker, and Congresswoman Nanette Diaz Barragán as a co-sponsor of the HEAL for Immigrant Families Act today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/heal-act/?source=em20210513&t=3&akid=286%2E420207%2EMby9OI)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/heal-act/?source=em20210513&t=4&akid=286%2E420207%2EMby9OI)**
Thank you for adding your voice to this fight,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210513-286-footer&t=5&refcode2=286_420207_Mby9OI&akid=286%2E420207%2EMby9OI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
